results.title: Stock Market Today, April 30: Caterpillar's Jump After Earnings Helped Fuel Surge in Dow | The Motley Fool
Stock Market Today (Apr. 29, 2026): Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, and Meta to report after bell after Fed shock, Trump Iran announcement - TheStreet
Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for April 30 - Bloomberg

summary: April 30: S&P 500 +0.46% to 7,168.62; Nasdaq +0.21% to 24,724.49; Dow +1.49% to 49,588.34. Caterpillar earnings beat drove Dow outperformance. Meta slumped ~9%, MSFT -5% on AI capex, GOOGL +9% on revenue beat. April shaping up as best month since late 2020.
